_comment: Nash equilibrium calling ranges vs all-in shoves by villain BB count

3bb.description: Call very wide vs desperate shove

5bb.description: Still wide - short stack is often shoving weak

8bb.description: Tightening up as shove range gets stronger

12bb.description: Getting tighter vs more chips at risk

20bb.description: Very tight - significant chips at risk

_notes.icm_adjustments: On bubble, reduce calling range by 20-40%
_notes.final_table: Consider pay jumps - may need even tighter calls
_notes.chip_leader: Can call slightly wider to pressure short stacks
